zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Elizabeth Hone於1512年出生在英國英格蘭戴文代文波特代文波特 聖 瑪麗時，她的父親Robert Hone22歲，母親Lady Johanne Freyne22歲。她於1529年與John William Periam在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1573年在英國戴文艾可謝特享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent stone, especially a boundary marker, from Middle English hone ‘stone, rock’ (Old English hān), the same word as modern English hone ‘whetstone’. Compare Honer .
German (Höne), in part of Sorbian origin: see Hoene and Hoehne .

variants.name: Honer
meanings: English: occupational name for a sharpener of tools, a grinder or honer, from a derivative of Middle English hone ‘whetstone’ (Old English hān ‘stone’) + -er. In Surrey, Sussex, and Hampshire, the name may also have been topographic for someone who lived by a prominent rock or by a boundary stone, from a Middle English derivative of Hone + -er. See Hone .

variants.name: Hones
meanings: English: variant of Hone , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Elizabeth Hone was born in 1512, in Devonport St Mary, Devonport, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Hone, was 22 and her mother, Lady Johanne Freyne, was 22. She married John William Periam in 1529, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1573, in Exeter, Devon, England, at the age of 61.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Elizabeth Hone(이)가 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 데폰포트 데폰포트 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hone(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Johanne Freyne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John William Periam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 영국 데폰 세터에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Elizabeth Hone родилась в 1512 г. в местности девонпорт ст мэри, девонпорт, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Hone было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Johanne Freyne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John William Periam в 1529 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1573 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия в возрасте 61 год.
